name: oap-email
description: Search and read cached email. Use for 'check my email', 'any new messages?', 'emails from Jane', 'email summary since yesterday', 'unread messages'. Messages are cached locally from IMAP — use 'list' to search/filter or 'summary' for an overview. Do NOT call 'scan' unless the user explicitly asks to refresh from the mail server. Returns sanitized plain text — no HTML, no raw MIME.

input.description: JSON with 'action' to select operation. Prefer 'list' or 'summary' — they query the local cache (already populated by background scans). Actions: 'list' (search/filter cached messages), 'summary' (activity overview with counts and senders), 'get' (single message by id), 'thread' (all messages in thread), 'scan' (fetch new from IMAP server — rarely needed).

since.description: ISO 8601 timestamp — only messages after this time

query.description: Search with OR support and field prefixes. Examples: 'Amy Brooks OR Keric Brooks', 'from:amy@netgate.net', 'from:Amy subject:car', 'subject:invoice'. Prefixes: from/sender, to, subject, body. Without prefix searches all fields.

output.description: Message objects with sanitized plain text bodies, sender/recipient info, thread IDs, and attachment metadata (no content). Summary returns counts, unique senders, and recent subjects.
